name: latticework seed, systems-aligned probe → no swap
description: Near-tie seed 'latticework-of-mental-models' has top-1 systems-thinking (adj_aff 0.1584) and top-2 first-principles-thinking (adj_aff 0.1576), δ=0.00083. A probe paraphrasing systems-thinking's curator AC should score higher against that edge's embedding, which ALREADY matches affinity order — so the gate fires but does not swap.
notes: Same-session authorship; needs second-reader review. Curator ACs (summary): systems-thinking → 'how models interact as an interconnected system'; first-principles → 'decomposing to fundamental truths'. Probe aligns with the first.
